prompt: Ultra-realistic DSLR portrait of a beautiful young South Asian woman wearing a soft peach hijab wrapped elegantly around her head and neck, with stylish white sunglasses resting on top of the hijab. She has smooth fair skin, expressive brown eyes, natural makeup, soft pink lips, and a gentle smile while looking slightly to the side. She is wearing a trendy leopard-print long dress with black inner sleeves, a pink smartwatch, and standing outdoors on a street with a creamy blurred urban background. Golden-hour natural lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic bokeh, realistic skin texture, ultra-sharp focus, premium fashion photography, 85mm lens, f/1.8, HDR, vibrant colors, professional color grading, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K, high quality.

promptZh: 一张超写实的单反相机肖像，展现了一位美丽的南亚年轻女性，她佩戴着一条优雅地包裹在头部和颈部的 柔和桃色 头巾，头巾上方架着一副时尚的白色太阳镜。她拥有细腻白皙的皮肤、富有表现力的棕色眼睛、自然妆容、柔和的粉色嘴唇，微微侧头，面带温柔的微笑。她身穿一件时髦的 豹纹 长裙，内搭黑色长袖，佩戴着粉色智能手表，站在户外街道上，背景是 奶油色模糊的都市背景。黄金时段自然光，浅景深，电影级焦外成像，真实的皮肤纹理，超清晰对焦，高端时尚摄影，85mm 镜头，f/1.8，HDR，色彩鲜艳，专业调色，照片级真实感，超精细，8K，高画质。
